themes.label: Provision

themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "How does confident anticipation of God's promised future strengthen your present obedience?". Word-study detail reinforces "יַֽעֲשׂ֥וּ: shall keep - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".
